get.summary: Returns the user medias
get.description: Get user medias. Returns a list of Media objects.

parameters.name: flat

schema.description: Flatten nested media objects into a single list
schema.title: Flat

parameters.description: Flatten nested media objects into a single list

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
res = await cl.user_medias_gql (
    user_id="123123", profile_grid_items_cursor=None
)
x-codeSamples.label: Python

get.summary: Get a user following (one request required)
get.description: ⚠️ Billing: 2 requests per call. Returns a list of User objects.

schema.title: Response User Following Chunk Gql User Following Chunk Get

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
followings, end_cursor = await cl.user_following_chunk_gql(
    user_id="123123", end_cursor=None
)
x-codeSamples.label: Python

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
items_list = []
end_cursor = None
while True:
    items, end_cursor = cl.user_following_chunk_gql("123123", end_cursor=end_cursor)
    items_list.extend(items)
    if not end_cursor:
        break
x-codeSamples.label: Python

get.summary: Get a user following (one request required)
get.description: Get part (one page) of following users with cursor. Returns a list of User objects.

get.summary: User About
get.description:
Get the "About this account" panel for a user: verified status,
country of registration, date the account was created, and the list
of former usernames. Returns user about info.

x-codeSamples.source:
from hikerapi import Client

cl = Client(<ACCESS_KEY>)
res = await cl.user_about_gql(id="25025320")
x-codeSamples.label: Python

get.summary: Get a user profile media (one page)
get.description: Get part (one page) of user medias. Returns a list of Media objects.

200.description: User's profile media grid. Media counters (play_count, like_count, comment_count, etc.) are returned as Instagram sends them. For the next page, pass the envelope's `next_page_id` back as the `next_page_id` query parameter. Ignore the raw `next_max_id` inside `response` — it is IG-internal metadata, not the cursor for this endpoint.

get.summary: Get user profile info GraphQL
get.description: Get user profile info by user id (GraphQL web_profile_info)

x-codeSamples.source:

x-codeSamples.label: Python

get.summary: Topsearch
get.description:
Search top content by keyword.

Returns top accounts AND top media interleaved in one stream —
discriminate by `__typename` (`XDTUserDict` / `XDTMediaDict`).

`flat=true` returns flat `items[]` instead of `stream_rows`.

parameters.name: flat

schema.description: Flatten stream_rows into a single items[] list
schema.title: Flat

parameters.description: Flatten stream_rows into a single items[] list

response.title: Response
response.description: Raw Instagram API response dict. Structure varies by endpoint.

next_page_id.title: Next Page Id
next_page_id.description: Cursor for the next page. Pass as page_id in the next request. null if no more pages.
